screen.dnd_six_attributes.title: DnD Six Attributes
attribute.dnd_six_attributes.strength.ef: Adds melee damage inside the vanilla attack-damage attribute layer. 20 = +20% melee damage value, 0 = -20%.
attribute.dnd_six_attributes.wisdom.effe: Highlights nearby entities for you only. 20 = 20 block range. No downside.
attribute.dnd_six_attributes.charisma.ef: Adjusts villager trade prices. 20 = 20% off, 0 = 20% markup.
